name: Jesus
oracleText:
Lifelink, vigilance
Whenever another nontoken creature enters the battlefield under your control, scry 1 and you gain 1 life.
{2}, {T}: Return target creature card with mana value 2 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield tapped.
flavorText: "And the Word was made flesh, and dwelt among us." — John 1:14
notes: Created from a checked Messianic Fulfillment card list item; first-pass mechanics, mana, colors, and stats added. Source boundary is anchored to Luke with Matthew, Mark, and John as support material per the Biblical-series timeline guide. Classics theme art uses James Tissot's "Our Lord Jesus Christ" via Wikimedia Commons.
title: Word Made Flesh

classics.license: Public domain; Brooklyn Museum Commons upload marked with no known restrictions.
classics.creditText: James Tissot, Our Lord Jesus Christ
classics.sourceNotes: A direct Tissot devotional portrait gives the set’s Jesus card a strong classics centerpiece.
